title: Madoku Craft: HUD
description: Madoku Craft: HUD overhauls Minecraft's UI. It simplifies the UI to display more information.
body:
Madoku Craft: HUD overhauls Minecraft's HUD system. It simplifies the UI to display more information. You can disable which UIs are displayed in the CONFIG file.

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a111e275ed39f0bf621987627665f81c202727db_0.webp)

## Dependencies:

- Fabric API
- Madoku Craft API

![WorldHUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2844ec42e5599d2a9289c12a84adec01a89ae0ae_0.webp)

## Implementation:

- Added a dedicated UI placed on the top left.
- It displays important information about your world.
- The existing UI is replaced with a single icon.
- It also displays text to convey the exact values.
